content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (post iter-101)

## Top priority ‚Äî close RES2, then keystone (a) falls
- **`pullbackUnit_sheafify_reconcile` (TensorObjInverse.lean L1661, sorry L1705)** is the SOLE
  remaining blocker for keystone (a). LHS is already fully reduced (transposed under sheaf
  `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction`, LHS = `cuX.app ùüô_X ‚â´ unitToPushforwardObjUnit œÜ`). Residual =
  RHS sheafification counit-slide mate-calculus.
- **DO NOT re-grind a direct `prove` pass on RES2 as-is.** The prover got it to a precise compiling
  partial and named the residual; the planner's iter-100 HARD WATCH said: if RES2 returns PARTIAL
  with the same counit-slide residual, ESCALATE. **Action: `effort-breaker` (or `mathlib-analogist`
  cross-domain) on the sheafification counit-slide**, cutting along the proven B1-crux
  `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` residual `hA2` (L459+) ‚Äî the residual is its EXACT shape specialised
  to ùüô_X (~80-150 LOC). Bricks already in scope: `hSCP =
  sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq`, `hEta = leftAdjointUniqUnitEta_app`, the two
  sheafification-counit triangles, `Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`.
- Once RES2 lands: (a) closes automatically (body sorry-free), then **(c)
  `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L2595) unblocks** ‚Äî do NOT assign (c) before (a) closes.

## HARD GATE note (blueprint)
- RES1/RES2 chapters are present + adequate (lvb PASS). The **new private helper
  `leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_homEquiv_symm`** (TensorObjInverse.lean ~L1564) has NO `\label`/`\lean`
  block ‚Äî it is exactly the displayed collapse equation at `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` L9097-9101.
  **Coverage debt: dispatch a blueprint-writer** to give it a Mathlib-adjacent block (uses
  `Adjunction.homEquiv_counit`, `NatTrans.naturality`, `Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_counit`)
  and reorder the RES1 proof prose to collapse-then-section (per the `% NOTE:` I added at L9101).

## MEDIUM ‚Äî stale-comment cleanup (auditor 2 major + 2 minor)
These contradict current proof state and will mislead future provers ‚Äî cheap `refactor`/comment edit:
- `TensorObjInverse.lean:1146` ‚Äî "see the `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` sorry below" ‚Äî that
  lemma (L1484-1514) now closes `rfl`, no sorry.
- `TensorObjInverse.lean:2329-2333` ‚Äî "BLOCKER ‚Ä¶ L3/L2 ‚Ä¶ residual sorries" inside
  `pullbackTensorMap_left_unitality`; proof IS executed (L2356) and both L2 (L2098) + L3 (L2178) are
  sorry-free. Doubly false.
- `TensorObjInverse.lean:556-558` ‚Äî stale "ESCALATION (per PROGRESS iter-052)" in a closed proof.
- `TensorObjInverse.lean:794,802` ‚Äî accurate-but-dead "STATUS (iter-044/051)" iter-citations.

## LOW
- Fragile `set_option` knobs (well-documented, cosmetic): L311-312 (`linter.unusedTactic` /
  `unreachableTactic` blanket); L972 (`backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false`).
- Dead dup `exists_tensorObj_inverse` @ `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:716` (sorry) ‚Äî deletion candidate,
  public twin lives in TensorObjInverse. Cleanup-phase.
- Coverage debt total: **158 unmatched** `lean_aux` (down 1 from 159). New: the helper above.

## Do-NOT-retry
- RES2 via a plain `prove` re-grind (escalate instead ‚Äî see top priority).
- Scheme-typed `dualIsoOfIso` coherence / `Functor.Monoidal (pullback œÜ)` (globally FALSE ‚Äî memory).
- Keyed `rw [map_comp]` / `rw [leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_counit]` / keyed `rw`/`show‚Ä¶from` of the
  `Scheme.Modules‚ÜîSheafOfModules` adjunction across the seam ‚Äî use TERM-mode `Eq.trans`/`congrArg` or
  `erw` respectively (this iter's proven idioms).
